productDisplayName: iPanema Women Ritmos Navy Blue Flats
description: ipanema sandals draw inspiration from the culture of the Brazilian city of ipanema. The tropical city's street style is reinterpreted in ipanema footwear - bold prints, vibrant colours and quirky embellishments. A brand with a cause, iPanema collaborated with Gisele Bü ndchen for a climate change project and these products represent their commitment to social-change. Upper T-straps with flower embellishments in rubber Soft footbed Branded lug on the footbed Floral print on the footbed Outsole Single piece PVC moulded, flexible outsole Waffle patterned grooves Sandal care Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
